causal_chain: 101_STEAM_3:GEN_REDUCE --[STEAM output change at bus 101: ΔP propagates via PTDF to all branches]--> B101:GEN_EFFECT
B101:GEN_EFFECT --[PTDF[A11,101]: injection change at bus 101 shifts flow on A11 (107→108)]--> A11:RELAY_TRIP
critique_items.correction: The pre-existing overload of 5.0 MW remained unresolved and A11 tripped at flow 180.0 MW > rating 175.0 MW. Root cause: corrective action targeted a bus with insufficient PTDF sensitivity to A11. The bus with highest PTDF sensitivity is bus 107 (PTDF[A11,107] = 1.0). Recommended correction: reduce 107_CC_1 by at least 5.0 MW to bring A11 flow within its continuous rating of 175.0 MW.

causal_chain: 101_STEAM_3:GEN_REDUCE --[STEAM output change at bus 101: ΔP propagates via PTDF to all branches]--> B101:GEN_EFFECT
B101:GEN_EFFECT --[PTDF[A11,101]: injection change at bus 101 shifts flow on A11 (107→108)]--> A11:RELAY_TRIP
A11:RELAY_TRIP --[cascade: trip of A11 isolates bus 108]--> B108:BLACKOUT
critique_items.correction: Bus 108 lost supply at t=150.0 s due to trip of branch A11. Resolve the RELAY_TRIP violation on A11 to prevent this blackout.

summary: The policy produced 2 violation(s). Please revise the action schedule according to the corrections below and resubmit.
